name: Robert Creeley
abstract: Robert White Creeley (May 21, 1926 – March 30, 2005) was an American poet and author of more than 60 books. He is associated with the Black Mountain poets, although his verse aesthetic diverged from that school.

about_quotes.speaker: Sheila Jordan
about_quotes.evidence: I also was on a Steve Swallow recording of Robert Creeley poetry called Home.
about_quotes.doc_title: Sheila Jordan — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
